name: @salahnecibi/pi-next-ncb
description_en: 🚀 pi-next — The ultimate next-gen enhancement suite for pi coding agent. Agent orchestration dashboard with real-time TUI, semantic compaction 2.0 that preserves decisions & files, streaming bash protocol with live output, context/tool/cost inspector, li
description_zh: 🚀 pi-next — pi 编码代理的终极下一代增强套件。具有实时 TUI 的代理编排仪表板，保留决策和文件的语义压缩 2.0，具有实时输出的流式 bash 协议，上下文/工具/成本检查器
